title: Second Public Availability of Modified Text and Availability of Additional Documents and/or Information for the Proposed Low Carbon Fuel Standard Amendments
content: On August 12, 2024, CARB issued a "Notice of Public Availability of Modified Text and Availability of Additional Documents and/or Information for the Proposed Low Carbon Fuel Standard Amendments" (First 15-Day Changes). The comment period for the First 15-Day Changes opened on August 12, 2024, and closed on August 27, 2024. CARB has determined that additional modifications are appropriate for the proposed amendments and has developed the proposed modifications as stated in the â€œSummary of Proposed Regulatory Modificationsâ€ section of the Second 15-Day Notice.
author: Analysts Account
